narrative:
Vandalia City has 10,662 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
